title: Extract Phone Numbers
scenario: Write a Python script that extracts phone numbers from a given text. The text may contain phone numbers in various formats (e.g., (123) 456-7890, 123-456-7890, 1234567890). The script should return a list of phone numbers in the format '(XXX) XXX-XXXX'. Ensure the script can handle multiple phone numbers in a single text and that the numbers are extracted correctly.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the script adheres to the constraints provided.
Verify if the Python code has proper syntax and is free of errors.
Check if the script correctly extracts the phone numbers from the input text and returns them in the correct format.
